fields.description: Master switch. When off, the kiosk never samples or records location.
fields.label: Enable Location Tracking

fields.description: Hold a Screen Wake Lock while clocked in and active so the screen stays on (improves tracking reliability on dedicated devices, but uses more battery).
fields.label: Keep Screen Awake While Active

fields.description: Record a new point only after the employee has moved at least this many meters from the last recorded point.
fields.label: Distance Filter (meters)

fields.description: Even when stationary, record a heartbeat point at least this often (seconds).
fields.label: Heartbeat Interval (seconds)

fields.description: Request high-accuracy GPS. More precise but significantly higher battery drain. Off by default.
fields.label: High Accuracy GPS

fields.description: Discard fixes whose reported accuracy is worse than this many meters (0 = accept all).
fields.label: Minimum Accuracy (meters)

fields.description: Maximum number of points sent per network request (also the server-side cap).
fields.label: Max Batch Size

fields.description: Automatically delete location logs older than this many days (0 = keep forever). Runs daily.
fields.label: Retention (days)
